0:{"buildId":"lnoaJFnVEmYIJeD01g7Dr","rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[["$","main",null,{"className":"min-h-screen","children":[["$","$L2",null,{}],["$","$L3",null,{"installBaseUrl":"https://osmedeus.org"}],["$","$L4",null,{}],["$","$L5",null,{}],["$","$L6",null,{}],["$","$L7",null,{"tabs":[{"id":"flow","label":"Flow","code":"# workflow.yaml - Osmedeus Workflow Example\nkind: flow\nname: demo-flow\ndescription: Demo flow orchestrating modules with decision routing\nparams:\n  - name: threads\n    default: \"5\"\n  - name: mode\n    default: \"full\"\nmodules:\n  - name: bash-module\n    path: sub-module/demo-bash.yaml\n    params:\n      threads: \"{{threads}}\"\n\n  - name: docker-module\n    path: sub-module/demo-docker.yaml\n    depends_on: [bash-module]\n    condition: \"{{mode}} == 'full'\"\n    on_success:\n      - action: export\n        name: scan_status\n        value: \"complete\"\n    decision:\n      switch: \"{{scan_status}}\"\n      cases:\n        \"complete\": { goto: ssh-module }\n      default: { goto: _end }\n\n  - name: ssh-module\n    path: sub-module/demo-ssh.yaml\n    depends_on: [docker-module]"},{"id":"bash","label":"Bash","code":"# workflow.yaml - Osmedeus Workflow Example\nkind: module\nname: demo-bash\ndescription: Demo bash steps with functions and exports\nparams:\n  - name: target\n    required: true\n  - name: threads\n    default: \"5\"\nsteps:\n  - name: setup\n    type: bash\n    command: mkdir -p {{Output}}/demo && echo \"{{Target}}\" > {{Output}}/demo/target.txt\n    exports:\n      target_file: \"{{Output}}/demo/target.txt\"\n  - name: run-parallel\n    type: bash\n    parallel_commands:\n      - 'echo \"Thread 1: {{Target}}\" >> {{Output}}/demo/results.txt'\n      - 'echo \"Thread 2: {{Target}}\" >> {{Output}}/demo/results.txt'\n  - name: check-result\n    type: function\n    function: 'fileLength(\"{{Output}}/demo/results.txt\")'\n    exports:\n      line_count: \"output\"\n  - name: summary\n    type: bash\n    command: 'echo \"Processed {{Target}} with {{line_count}} lines\"'"},{"id":"docker","label":"Docker","code":"# workflow.yaml - Osmedeus Workflow Example\nkind: module\nname: demo-docker\ndescription: Demo Docker runner with remote-bash\nparams:\n  - name: target\n    required: true\nsteps:\n  - name: docker-single\n    type: remote-bash\n    log: \"Running in Alpine container\"\n    step_runner: docker\n    step_runner_config:\n      image: alpine:latest\n      volumes:\n        - \"{{Output}}:/output\"\n    command: 'echo \"Target: {{Target}}\" > /output/docker-out.txt'\n  - name: docker-parallel\n    type: remote-bash\n    step_runner: docker\n    step_runner_config:\n      image: alpine:latest\n    parallel_commands:\n      - 'echo \"Scan A: {{Target}}\"'\n      - 'echo \"Scan B: {{Target}}\"'\n    exports:\n      docker_done: \"true\""},{"id":"ssh","label":"SSH","code":"# workflow.yaml - Osmedeus Workflow Example\nkind: module\nname: demo-ssh\ndescription: Demo SSH runner with remote-bash\nparams:\n  - name: target\n    required: true\n  - name: ssh_host\n    default: \"localhost\"\n  - name: ssh_user\n    default: \"testuser\"\n  - name: ssh_password\n    default: \"testpass\"\n\nsteps:\n  - name: ssh-connect\n    type: remote-bash\n    log: \"Executing via SSH\"\n    step_runner: ssh\n    step_runner_config:\n      host: \"{{ssh_host}}\"\n      port: 2222\n      user: \"{{ssh_user}}\"\n      password: \"{{ssh_password}}\"\n    commands:\n      - 'echo \"Target: {{Target}}\"'\n      - 'hostname && whoami'\n    exports:\n      ssh_done: \"true\""},{"id":"agent","label":"Agent","code":"# workflow.yaml - Osmedeus Workflow Example\nkind: module\nname: test-agent-acp\ndescription: Test agent-acp step with ACP protocol subprocess\ntags: test,agent-acp,acp\n\nparams:\n  - name: target\n    required: true\n    default: example.com\n\nsteps:\n  # Basic agent-acp step with built-in agent\n  - name: acp-basic\n    type: agent-acp\n    log: \"Running ACP agent for {{Target}}\"\n    agent: claude-code\n    messages:\n      - role: user\n        content: \"List the files in the current directory and summarize the results.\"\n    exports:\n      acp_result: \"{{acp_output}}\"\n\n  # Use ACP output in a subsequent bash step\n  - name: use-acp-output\n    type: bash\n    log: \"Using ACP agent output\"\n    command: echo \"Agent said - {{acp_result}}\""}]}],"$L8"]}],["$L9","$La","$Lb"],"$Lc"]}],"loading":null,"isPartial":false}
